title: IC analyst portfolio build kit; skill taxonomy S01-S26
public_claim: IC analyst portfolio build kit; skill taxonomy S01-S26 is a preserved project packet for portfolio build kit that converts Georgetown MPAI (Master of Professional Studies in Applied Intelligence) coursework — counterterrorism papers, cyber CTI briefs, CI risk assessments, geospatial products, major academic papers — into IC-style sanitized work samples suitable for IC analyst hiring.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
use_value: It functions as a professional-development control surface: roles, competencies, evidence, and next actions are organized so preparation can be audited rather than guessed.

component_proofs.verification_check: Test one representative case; confirm input (source packet, code-ready room description, scope...) produces output (bounded definition of what the handoff asks a builder...) and leaves a visible decision or artifact.
